Auth._comment: Authority is the Keycloak realm issuer (e.g. https://identity.trefry.net/realms/<realm>). Audience is the JWT 'aud' (e.g. codeflow-api). Both must be set in production via Auth__Authority / Auth__Audience environment variables; AddCodeFlowAuth fails fast at startup if DevelopmentBypass is false and either is empty. CliClientId / CliScopes are the public OAuth client id and space-separated scopes advertised to first-run CodeFlow-CLI clients via GET /api/auth/config.
